name: CCA Prep Marketplace
description: Local marketplace of tooling built during Claude Certified Architect — Foundations prep. One plugin: cca-toolkit, bundling the explain-diff slash command, the security-reviewer sub-agent, and the rm -rf PreToolUse hook.

plugins.name: cca-toolkit
plugins.description: Slash command (/explain-diff), sub-agent (security-reviewer), and a PreToolUse hook that blocks rm -rf.
